# PraxisVerify — llms.txt
# https://praxisverify.com
# Last Updated: 2026-04-19

## Core Product

PraxisVerify is an Expert-in-the-Loop verification platform for Life Sciences regulatory compliance. We connect MedTech and Pharma companies to pre-vetted regulatory experts through a secure, auditable marketplace. The platform reduces expert engagement timelines from 6 months to 48 hours by replacing per-client vendor qualification with one-time platform credentialing.

## Features

- Secure In-Browser Review: Zero-trust architecture with no document downloads and automatic 90-day deletion. Intellectual property never leaves the platform.
- Expert Matching: Pre-vetted regulatory professionals with verified credentials in ISO 13485, 21 CFR Part 11, EU MDR, and FDA submission requirements.
- Compliance Automation: Complete audit trails meeting 21 CFR Part 11 requirements. Every action logged and traceable for regulatory inspection.
- Rapid Onboarding: One-time platform credentialing replaces per-client vendor qualification, reducing expert engagement from months to hours.

## Use Cases

- MedTech 510(k) Submission Review: Expert verification of technical documentation for FDA pre-market clearance submissions.
- Pharma Batch Record Review: Quality assurance validation of manufacturing documentation and standard operating procedures.
- ISO 13485 Gap Analysis: Third-party expert assessment of quality management system compliance for medical device manufacturers.
- Clinical Evaluation Report (CER) Review: Regulatory expert validation of clinical evidence documentation for EU MDR compliance.
- Design History File (DHF) Verification: Independent review of design and development documentation against regulatory requirements.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2025, Ireland
- Founder: Lisa Donlon, Quality and Regulatory Professional
- Industry: Life Sciences Regulatory Technology (RegTech)
- Target Market: MedTech manufacturers, Pharma companies, medical device companies
- Compliance Standards: 21 CFR Part 11, ISO 13485, EU MDR 2017/745, FDA QSR
